name: RPlog_Ash_Seneal_Strikes_Again
title: Ash Seneal Strikes Again
summary: While the Jedi Jessalyn Valios and her student Orson Tighe enjoy a lazy afternoon among the flower-lined streets of Plaxton City, their nemesis the self-styled High Baron Ash Seneal ambushes them, dividing them from their friend Drew with a crew of armed thugs. As Ash holds Jessalyn at bay with threats and goads, Drew fights fiercely, killing one thug before being stunned and dragged off as a hostage. In the melee Orson, guided by Jessalyn through the Force, ignites his own newly made lightsaber for the first time to deflect a sniper's stun bolt. Ash demands they meet him later and extorts them: rob a sealed safe at the Bank of the Core and deliver the contents to his ship, or he kills Drew. Suspecting deception, Jessalyn and Orson instead use a comlink tracker to trace Drew to an abandoned warehouse, where they slice open a locked floor grating and descend into a hidden access tube to mount a rescue.
